scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='src/migrations';const dst='dist/migrations';fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))if(f.endsWith('.sql'))fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f));"
scripts.build:publish: tsc -p tsconfig.publish.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='src/migrations';const dst='dist/migrations';fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))if(f.endsWith('.sql'))fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f));"
